name: Central Iron Ore Limited
summary: Central Iron Ore Limited focuses on the exploration and development of gold projects in Western Australia. It holds interests in the Yilgarn Iron Ore Project, which comprises 10 tenements covering 652 square kilometers located within the Yilgarn Iron Ore Province; and the South Darlot Gold Project that covers an area of 190 square kilometers situated in North West of Kalgoorlie. The company was formerly known as International Gold Mining Limited and changed its name to Central Iron Ore Limited in January 2010. Central Iron Ore Limited was incorporated in 1996 and is headquartered in Sydney, Australia.
